description:
Informal note addressed to a certain Bayān. In Arabic script, written in a crude hand (reminiscent of BL OR 5566B.1). It is a belligerent message about something the addressee said about a qīrāṭ of nuqra and how the sender went to request a dirham from Fuḍayl who said he didn't have anything. There may be a threat to go to the wālī in the penultimate line. Needs further examination.

On recto there is a piyyut written by Shelomo b. Eliyya, who signed his name on verso.
